name: Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket - Dots & Checks - 3pk - Cloud Island™
description:
Refresh your little one's nursery decor with this 3-Pack of Muslin Swaddle Baby Blankets from Cloud Island™. The pack features three 47-inch square baby blankets — one adorned with green polka dots on a white background, one with a green-and-white checkered pattern, and one with green stars and dots against a white backdrop — offering charming swaddling options. Soft, breathable and warm, these multipurpose baby blankets are crafted from 100% muslin cotton for a gentle, oh-so-soft feel against their delicate skin.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
